prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-WATERPROOF-NOTEBOOK-RL-2PK Product Type: BLANK_BOOK Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 2pk Waterproof Paper Pocket Spiral Notebook Travel Notes Journal Field Notepad with Pencil, Green, 50 Page Lined Description: If inclement weather hits, whether you're camping, responding to an emergency situation, boating or preparing a survival kit. the ASR Outdoor Waterproof Paper Pocket Spiral Notebook Travel Journal Field Notepad is ready to weather the elements with you.

Measuring 3 x 5 inches, the notepad includes 50 white, lined pages, a waterproof cover, top bound secure spiral, side ruler for measuring inches or millimeters and comes with a three-inch pencil.

Whether you're planning a backpacking adventure, need a notepad to jot down notes or just want to have some scrap paper on hand for your next camping trip, the ASR Outdoor notepad is lightweight, pocket-sized and compact, making it incredibly portable and great for all kinds of travel.

Lastly, this notepad is not limited to just camping, outdoor excursions or survival kits; it's also ideal for journalists, lab workers, emergency first responders, tactical professionals or police or law enforcement officers, where work events or situations can outdoors in less than desirable weather conditions.

This memo pad is ready to accompany you on adventure you set out for, perfect for any outdoor situation where notetaking, fact recording or capturing creativity or new ideas are needed. Search Terms: notebook composition spiral pocket small journal travelers college ruled mini blank field note waterproof drawing to do list bound travel white boating accessories gifts books camping supplies essentials gear gratitude for men Features: - WATERPROOF & WEATHERPROOF NOTEBOOK: Measuring 3 x 5 inches, the notepad includes 50 white lined pages, a waterproof cover, top bound secure spiral, green ruler for measuring inches or millimeters and a 3 inch pencil - PERFECT TRAVEL JOURNAL: ASR Outdoor notepad is lightweight, pocket-sized and compact, making it incredibly portable and great for all kinds of travel - WATERPROOF NOTEPAD COVER: A tough but flexible notepad cover in green colorway will repel water, moisture and other liquids, keeping your writing paper with notes safe and dry - MULTI-DISCIPLINARY NOTEPAD: This notepad is not limited to just camping, outdoor excursions or survival kits; it's also ideal for journalists, lab workers, emergency first responders, tactical professionals or police or law enforcement officers. - SPECIFICATIONS: Product Dimension: 3 x 5 x 0.5 inches; Color: Green; Lined Pages: 50; Page Color: White; 3-inch Pencil Included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2-Pk 3x5 Green Waterproof Pocket Spiral Notebook

anthropic.title_differentiation: Waterproof Cover, 50 Lined Pages, Spiral Bound, Pocket-Sized, Includes Pencil And Ruler, Travel Journal

openai.title_differentiation: 50 Lined Pages, Waterproof Cover, Top Spiral Bound, Built-In Inch And MM Ruler, 3-Inch Pencil Included
